source_title: 09 Shrine - Raya and the Last Dragon/02 Shrine - Asset Zoo

evidences.content: 好了，现在让我们开始用 Quixel 资产构建场景。 All right, now let's start blocking out our scene with Quixel assets. 所以我就去拿了几个。 So I went ahead and grabbed a couple of these. 我会在本视频下方留下一份清单。 I'll leave a list underneath this video. 不过，这些都是我要开始使用的资产，如果我们稍后下载任何资产，我会通知你。 But these are all of the assets that I'll start with and I'll let you know if we download any later on. 我们还将使用之前的街道路缘石，并让大家知道目前场景中的树叶情况 We'll also use our street curbs from before and just so you know for our foliage in the scene so far 我们会有这些草资产，然后这些是荷叶。这里的形状可能看起来像草或其他东西。 we're gonna have these grass assets and then these are lily pads. The shape here might look like they're grass or something. 但就上下文而言，这就是这些东西的用途。 But for context, that's what these will be used for. 一旦导入了所有这些资产，我喜欢做的一件事就是制作一个名为 "资产动物园 "的东西。 Now one thing I like to do once I have all these assets imported is I like to make something called an asset zoo. 这只是地图的一部分，我们将在 3D 场景中放置所有这些不同的对象 This is just a part of the map where we'll place all of these different objects in our 3D scene 这样我们就可以在场景中复制、粘贴和重复这些内容。 so we can copy and paste and duplicate these across our scene. 所以，我要跳出我们的镜头切入视角 So I'm gonna jump out of our camera cut view here 然后按下 Ctrl 1 键，保存摄像机的位置和 and I'm gonna press ctrl 1 to save this camera position and 现在，当我在场景中移动时，我总是可以跳回来按 1 键。 now when I move around in the scene I can always jump back and press the 1 key. 然后我们就回到了开始的地方。现在，在我们的地图之外 And we'll be right back to where we started. So now outside of our map 我就跳到这里，开始导入所有资产。 I'm gonna just jump over here and we'll start importing all of our assets. 你可以做的一件很酷的事情是，一旦你下载了这些软件，你就可以从 Quixel Bridge 上点击并拖动它们。 And a cool thing you can do is once you have any of these downloaded you can literally click and drag them from Quixel Bridge. 下载完成后，我就可以把它拖到我的场景中了。 So this is downloaded and I can just drag it into my scene. 因此，我将继续为所有这些资产做这件事。然后导入一些纹理，比如这个日本庭院的地板 So I'll go ahead and do this for all of these assets. And to import some of our textures like this Japanese courtyard floor 我们只需创建一个平面，然后 we'll just create a plane and 你可以直接点击并拖动到飞机上，然后我们再对其他纹理进行处理。 you can just click and drag right onto the plane and then we'll do this for the rest of our textures. 对于这些百合花和草地资产，你要知道，实际上有几种资产会出现在这里 Now for these lily pads and grass assets just so you know, there's actually several assets that will come in 但它只会将一个实例拖入场景。 but it'll just drag one instance into your scene. 但我们可以在周围填充这些额外的元素，你也可以随时点击并拖动这些元素到场景中。 But you do have these extra ones that we can populate around but you can always click and drag these into your scene whether that's 为荷叶或这些不同的草资产。 for the lily pads or these different grass assets. 在继续之前，我还要做最后一件事 因为现在是我们布置场景的时候了 And the last thing I'm gonna do before proceeding just because now is kind of our time to set up the scene 这样我们以后就不用担心了。 so we don't have to worry about it later. 我将按照之前的方法，把这些材料转换成 3D 纳米网格。 I'm gonna convert these materials into 3D Nanite meshes the same way I did that before. 你现在应该知道怎么做了。所以我就跳到前面。 You should know how to do this by now. So I'll skip ahead. 好了，我已经把这些纹理转换成三维位移了。 All right, so I've gone ahead and I've converted these textures into 3D displacements. 关于这种长满青苔的溪石材料，我想说几件事。 A couple things I want to talk about here for this mossy creek stone material. 如果你近距离观察，你会发现我们的水并不像我们希望的那样，当我们简化时 One thing that you'll notice if you get up close is that our water doesn't quite react how we'd like and when we simplify 这个网格，如果我转到线框，当它试图简化平面时 this mesh, if I go to the wireframe, when it tries to simplify planes 这样就会产生一些像这样的几何图形，要在上面获得适当的水反射效果非常困难。 it'll create some geometry like this, which is very difficult to get proper water reflections on them. 你会看到，我们开始在水平方向上出现一些条带。 You'll see that we start to get some banding horizontally. 但我们可以快速解决这个问题，那就是创建另一个平面 But one really quick fix we can do on this is we can just create another plane 在它下面放上同样大小的水管，然后把水管拉到水位线的起点处。 that's the same exact size underneath it and just bring this up to exactly where the water line starts. 这将为我们提供一个更好的基线，你可以在左侧看到、 And this will just give us a nicer baseline and you can see here on the left side, 尤其是当我看到太阳的倒影时，拥有这架飞机和没有这架飞机之间的差别有多大。 especially when I look at the reflection of the Sun, how big of a difference that makes between having this plane and not having it. 但你必须记住，我们必须在场景中不断移动它。 But you will have to keep in mind that we'll have to keep moving this around our scene as we go. 但我想创造的另一个资产是我们在这个圆形池塘周围看到的这个环。 But another asset I'd like to create is this ring that we see around this circular pond. 我认为，我们可以通过重新利用日式庭院的地板，很快就能做到这一点。 And I think we can make that pretty quickly by repurposing our Japanese courtyard floor. 所以我要做的就是复制这个，在这里复制一份、 So what I'm gonna do here is I'm going to duplicate this, make a copy right here, 然后将其重命名为 "修剪件 01"。 and then we'll rename this to Trim Piece 01. 现在，我们可以通过 Alt 拖动来复制它，然后按住 Shift 键，把它拖到这里。 And now we can duplicate this by Alt dragging and then Shift and dragging this over here. 让我们增大 Z 轴的刻度，让地面更加凹凸不平。 Let's increase the scale in Z to get a bit of a bumpier ground. 因此，将 0.75 改为 1.5。 So change this from 0.75 to 1.5. 然后，为了制作这张装饰纸，我们要把它复制几次。 And then to make this trim sheet, we're just gonna duplicate it several times. 只要我们把瓷砖铺设的位置保持不变，就能让它们完美地对齐。 And as long as we keep the tiling the same, we can make it so they'll line up perfectly. 但我们只想拿到薄薄的一片岩石，而不是整块。 But we just want to get a thin sliver of rock instead of this entire piece. 因此，我将回到我们最初的作品，创建两个不同的立方体，用于相交 So I'm gonna go back to our original piece and let's just create two different cubes that we can use to intersect 这块地板把它排好 this piece of floor here. So let's line this up. 我会把这个加厚一点，让它完全覆盖我们的地板，然后我们再复制一个。 I'll make this a little bit thicker so that it totally covers our floor and then we'll make a duplicate. 这也有助于切换到非照明模式，查看交叉路口的具体位置。 And this can also help to just swap to unlit mode to see exactly where that intersection is happening. 看起来我们可以把这个旋转一下。 And it looks like we can rotate this just a bit. 我们旋转得越多，就越能在平铺中看到旋转。 The more we rotate it, the more we'll see that rotation in the tiling. 不过，只要我们保持很小的轮换幅度，应该不会有太大影响。 But as long as we keep that rotation really small, it shouldn't make a big difference. 所以在这里我就不担心了。好吧暂时就这样吧 So I won't worry about it here. Okay, cool. That should do it for now. 实际上，我们要在这里创建两块地板。所以，我要再次复制我们的地板。 And let's actually create two pieces here. So I'm going to duplicate our floor a second time. 因此，在我们的内容浏览器中，让我们把这块装饰板复制到这里。 So in our content browser, let's copy this trim piece over here. 让我们再复制一份，然后按 F2 键开始重命名，并将其设置为 02。 Let's make another copy and then I'll press F2 to start renaming it and we'll just set this to 02. 现在我们有了 01 号和 02 号装饰件。 So now we have trim piece 01 and 02. 现在，如果我们回到地板对象，可以看到我们并没有分配这些复制的网格。 And now if we go back to our floor object, we can see that we didn't assign these duplicated meshes that we made. 所以我要把它指定为装饰件 1，然后复制这个，指定为装饰件 2。 So I'm gonna assign it trim piece 1 and then duplicate this and assign trim piece 2. 现在，我们可以把第二层庭院藏在这里。 Now we can hide our second courtyard floor here. 现在我们回到建模模式。 So we just have the 1. And now let's go back to modeling mode. 然后，我们可以先选择方格，再将这两个方格合并在一起。 And then we can select our squares first and let's merge these two squares together. 然后我们就有了正方形，接着我们选择日式庭院地板，然后点击网格 bool。 And then we have our squares and then we'll select our Japanese courtyard floor and then click on mesh bool. 在这种情况下，我们换成 B-A。这样我们就只剩下这块薄薄的装饰板了。 And in this case, we'll swap over to B-A. So that all we're left with is this thin trim piece. 那就按 "接受 "吧。在铺贴之前，我们要再复制一次，然后分配之前的装饰块。 So let's press accept. And before we tile this, we'll want to duplicate this again and we'll assign our previous trim piece. 现在我们有了 02 号装饰件，我们要重复同样的步骤、 So now we have trim piece 02 and we're gonna repeat the same thing, 但只要把布尔切片做得更小一点就可以了。 but just make that boolean slice a little bit smaller. 再次拖动球体。我们将按 Y 轴缩放，然后将其对齐，这样我们就能在它们之间得到一条细线。 So again, just drag in that sphere. We'll scale it in Y and then just line it up so that we get a thin sliver in between them. 现在，我们只需快速将这两个立方体合并在一起。 So now we'll just quickly merge these two cubes together. 使用网格布尔运算还可以做一件事，那就是创建一个联合体，将两个对象组合在一起。 One thing you can also do with mesh bool is you can create a union and combine two objects together. 如果这是你想要的。然后，我们将再次选择底层。 If that's what you'd like. And then we'll just select our ground floor again once those are combined. 然后按下网格 bool，将差值设置为 B-A。 And then press on mesh bool and then set our difference to B-A. 这样就能得到一块相同的装饰板，但只是这块较薄的，而不是两块合在一起。 And this should get us an identical piece of trim, but just this thinner piece and not the two combined together. 现在，让我们把它们靠得更近一些。 So now let's get these closer together. 因为我们想用这些东西来复制它们，把它们作为池塘周围的装饰，做成圆形、 And because we want to use these to duplicate them and use them as the trim around our pond and make them in a circular shape, 为了以正确的方式准备这些，我们要把它们做得更大一些。 to prepare these in the right way, we're gonna make these a lot bigger. 因此，我们要确保已启用 "抢拍 "功能，并将其设置为 50 度 "抢拍"。 So let's make sure snapping is enabled and we'll set this to 50 degrees of snapping. 然后我们复制这个，拖动它，直到它们平铺。 And then we'll just duplicate this and drag it out until they're tiling. 然后我们就这样做，直到一共有八份为止。 And then we'll just do this until we have eight total copies. 现在我们可以看到，瓷砖铺设得非常完美。 And now we can see that they're tiling perfectly. 因为我们使用的是 50 度卡扣，所以没有任何孔洞或缝隙之类的东西。 We don't have any holes or gaps or anything because we use our 50 degree snapping. 现在这一切都已完成，我们剩下的唯一步骤就是把所有这些结合在一起。 And now that this is finished, the only step we have left is to combine all of these together. 因此，选择每一行，然后选择合并工具。 So select each row and then select the merge tool. 然后，我们将把这些对象合并到一个新对象中。 And then we'll merge these together in a new object. 现在它是一个对象，支点设置在中间。 And now it's one object with the pivot point set to the middle. 然后我们再对另一块做同样的处理。 And then we'll do the same for our other piece. 只需选择链条的每个部分，然后将它们合并在一起即可。 Just select every single part of the chain and then merge them together. 现在，我们有了我们的位移装饰板，我们的每种材料的位移、 So now we have our displaced trim sheets, our displacements for each of our materials, 然后是一些我们可以带进来的石头和树叶演员。 and then a few rocks and foliage actors that we can bring in. 我们以后可能还需要添加几块石头，但这至少可以让我们有一个起步。 We might need to add a couple rocks later, but this will at least give us something to start with. 我们还想把两样东西带入场景。 There's two more things we'll want to bring into the scene. 首先是树木。 And the first is going to be trees. 我对此的最佳建议是，你可以从市场上获得免费资产、 And the best recommendation I have for that, something that's a free asset that you can get off of the marketplace, 会得到这个 Megascans 树包。 would be to get this Megascans trees pack. 首先，我们看到的是 Megascans 树种的普通榛树。 First, we have this Megascans tree common hazel. 而这些与我们的参考文献完全吻合。 And these match our reference exactly. 因此，只需免费下载即可。 So just download this for free. 再说一遍，这是在市场、Epic Games 启动器下，而不是在 Quixel Bridge 下。 And again, this is under the marketplace, under the Epic Games launcher, not under Quixel Bridge. 这是他们在市场上才拥有的资产。 This is an asset that they only have on the marketplace. 然后将其添加到项目中即可。 And then just add it to your project. 因此，这些文件将加载到这个普通榛子文件夹下。 So those will load in under this common hazel folder. 在这里，我们可以在资产动物园和地图下一起预览所有内容。 From here, we can preview everything together under their asset zoo, under their maps. 否则，只需进入几何图形工具集，然后进入枢轴画家文件夹。 Otherwise, just go to the geometry tool set and we'll go to their pivot painter folder. 不过，从这里开始，我们就可以到另一个地方去铺设这些东西了。 But from here, we'll just go over to another spot where we can lay these out. 它们会从大到小依次排列。 And they'll go from biggest to smallest. 因此，如果我把这五个或这七个拖到这里，我就可以把它们一个个拖进来。 So if I just drag these five or let's grab these seven here, I can just drag these in one by one. 现在我们有了一些树木，可以在背景中随意摆放。 And now we have some trees that we can place around in our background. 然后按 Ctrl 3 键制作相机书签。 And I'll hit Ctrl 3 to make a camera bookmark. 现在，只要按下 2 键，我就可以在我们的洞穴内部和我们的位移资产动物园之间切换、 So now I can swap between inside of our cave to our displacement asset zoo when I press the 2 key, 当我们按下 3 时，它就会转到我们的树上。 and then over to our trees when we press 3. 现在，浏览整个项目变得非常简单。 And now it's really easy to navigate throughout your project.
evidences.speaker: instructor
